The '''Saari Ha system''', also known as the '''Bimmisaari system''', was a [[Star system/Legends|star system]] located within the [[Halla sector/Legends|Halla sector]] of the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]] region of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The system contained the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bimmisaari/Legends|Bimmisaari]].

{{System-stub}}
